mnemonics: Many Elephants Need Numerous Network Connections
Nancy Easily Networks Thousands Of Nodes Correctly
keyPoints: A computer network has n nodes, each connected through an Ethernet LAN.
Each node can act as a source and destination for multiple traffic nodes.
Congestion window is the amount of data that can be transmitted without causing network congestion.
Plotting congestion window for different source/destination pairs helps in understanding network flow.
To visualize the congestion window, use a graph where x-axis represents time and y-axis represents congestion window size.
